source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE (M/W/D) 

We are Workerbase - a fast-growing B2B software company on a mission to digitize and transform shopfloor operations. Our platform empowers frontline workers with real-time data, AI, and dynamic workflows, replacing rigid, paper-based processes in manufacturing.

Today, Fortune 500 manufacturers like Porsche, Siemens, Bosch, thyssenkrupp, BASF, and many more rely on Workerbase to improve efficiency, reduce scrap, and achieve measurable ROI in less than six months.

Backed by top-tier investors including Point Nine, Almaz Capital, and Porsche Ventures, we are scaling rapidly - and now we’re looking for a Senior Account Executive to help us drive the next phase of enterprise growth.

If you see sales as strategic advisory, enjoy complex enterprise deals, and want to build something that truly matters - keep reading 👇




⭐ What makes this role so great:



Have a real impact 🚀

 - You own enterprise sales end-to-end and directly influence Workerbase’s growth trajectory - from first conversation to global rollout.
   
   

More than just selling ✌️

 - You’re not selling just licenses. You’re advising manufacturers on how to fundamentally improve how their factories run.
   
   

Enterprise exposure & deal sizes 💰

 - Work on six-figure ACVs with a clear path to multi-million-euro global rollouts through a proven land & expand strategy.
   
   

Full ownership & autonomy 🎓

 - You shape deal strategy, build winning game plans, and help define scalable sales processes - no micromanagement.
   
   

Startup speed, enterprise substance 🏎️

 - Combine the agility of a fast-scaling startup with the credibility of selling a proven platform to global market leaders.



Leverage a powerful partner ecosystem 🤝

 - .Accelerate deals by co-selling with an established network of industrial consulting and technology partners, unlocking larger deal sizes and faster enterprise rollouts.



Enjoy the “cherries” 🍒

 - Join at the right time: benefit from a ready-to-close pipeline with consistent inbound leads, while your ideas and contributions actively shape our sales motion, culture, and future growth.





🪄 What we will trust you with is

 - Owning the full sales cycle from qualification to close for complex enterprise deals

 - Engaging with C-level Operations, Plant Directors, and VP-level stakeholders

 - Driving consultative sales conversations around OEE, downtime, quality, and workforce efficiency

 - Managing and expanding key Fortune 500 accounts using a land & expand approach

 - Building structured deal strategies using methodologies like MEDDIC

 - Partnering closely with Solution Engineers, Marketing, and Customer Success to win complex evaluations, POCs, and ROI approvals

 - Contributing to scalable sales structures, best practices, and forecasting accuracy
   
   
   

🤝 We want YOU because:

 - You have 5+ years of experience in B2B SaaS sales, or as an consultant, ideally enterprise business

 - You’ve consistently closed or managed complex, high-value deals or customers with multiple stakeholders

 - You have experience selling into manufacturing, industrial, or operations-heavy environments (strong plus)

 - You combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution - builder mindset

 - You’re resilient, structured, and comfortable with long sales cycles (4–10 months)

 - You’re fluent in German and English (spoken and written)

 - You’re a strong communicator and storyteller who can connect business value to real-world impact

 - You take full ownership, challenge constructively, and thrive in a team of high performers



🎁 Some more cool things Workerbase can offer you:

 - The unique opportunity to drive a revolution in the manufacturing industry at Fortune 500 clients

 - Great responsibility right from the start and the opportunity to shape where our business is going

 - Growing team with diverse backgrounds to work with and learn from

 - Flexible and hybrid work environment

 - Competi

source_jobs.title: Solution Consultant (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
We are Workerbase – building an AI platform that digitizes manual manufacturing processes for global brands like Porsche, Siemens, and Bosch. Demand is growing fast. We need a Solution Consultant who wants to take ownership and transform shopfloor processes worldwide.

If you’re ambitious, hands-on, and eager to challenge “the way things have always been done” – keep reading. 👇






⭐ WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE EXCITING

 - Work with global leaders 🌱
   Engage directly with senior decision-makers at the world’s top manufacturers. Your work shapes how their factories run.
   

 - Build AI solutions – fast 🧩
   Use our low-code platform to design and launch high-impact shopfloor apps within days.
   

 - Real ownership 🚀
   Lead customer projects end-to-end. Drive measurable results. Shape our product and business strategy with your learnings.
   

 - Dynamic startup culture 🏎️
   No corporate layers. No waiting for approval. You make the calls, with a strong team behind you.






🪄 WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the Workerbase solution for your customers.

 - Run workshops to understand their challenges and design smart solutions.

 - Build and deploy apps on our low-code AI platform.

 - Train customer teams to create their own solutions.

 - Spot growth opportunities and engage senior stakeholders.

 - Feed your insights directly into our product roadmap.






🤝 YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

 - Take initiative and enjoy leading projects.

 - Have some experience in consulting or customer-facing roles.

 - Understand tech and can write basic code.

 - Can grasp and design complex processes fast.

 - Speak German at C1 level or above.

 - Love learning, improving, and challenging the status quo.

 - Bonus: Know manufacturing or production workflows.






🎁 WHAT YOU GET

 - Real responsibility from day one.

 - A growing team of sharp minds to learn from.

 - Flexible, hybrid work setup.

 - Competitive salary, benefits, and learning budget.

 - Sports & wellness membership via Wellpass.

 - Stock options to share in our success.

 - A cool central office in Munich and legendary company events.






🔎 ABOUT US

We exist because there’s a smarter way to produce. With environmental and demographic challenges ahead, we’re on a mission to future proof the production operations of the largest manufacturers in the world.

We patch the gap between frontline workers, machines, and data—digitizing manual work with AI in a low‑code environment connected to the manufacturer's core IT systems. We believe technology should empower people, not replace them. If you’re ready to upend “we’ve always done it this way,” we want to meet you.

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE (M/W/D)




WIR SIND WORKERBASE

Workerbase ist ein schnell wachsendes B2B-Softwareunternehmen, das Shopfloor-Operations transformiert. Unsere Plattform stattet Frontline-Teams mit Echtzeitdaten, intelligenter Automatisierung und dynamischen Workflows aus – und ersetzt fragmentierte Legacy-Systeme sowie papierbasierte Prozesse durch skalierbare, digitale Execution.

Vertrauen schenken uns Fortune-500-Unternehmen wie Porsche, Siemens, Bosch und BASF. Unterstützt von führenden Investoren starten wir in unsere nächste Phase des Enterprise-Wachstums.

Um diese Expansion zu beschleunigen, suchen wir eine:n Business Development Representative, der/die in strukturierter und datengetriebener Weise eine hochwertige Pipeline aufbaut.




🎁 WAS WORKERBASE DIR BIETET

 - Die Möglichkeit, ein bewährtes Enterprise-Produkt mitzugestalten, das bereits von globalen Marktführern eingesetzt wird

 - Klarer Wachstumspfad in Richtung Account Executive oder andere GTM-Rollen

 - Starke Performance-Kultur mit viel Autonomie und Vertrauen

 - Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung mit leistungsbasierter Upside

 - Mitarbeiterbeteiligung (VSOP), um am Erfolg von Workerbase teilzuhaben

 - Flexible & hybride Arbeitsweise

 - Learning & Development Budget (1.500 EUR pro Jahr)

 - Sport- & Wellness-Zuschuss (Wellpass)

 - 28 Urlaubstage, mit einem zusätzlichen Tag pro Jahr (bis maximal 30 Tage)

 - Onboarding & Training durch erfahrene SaaS Sales Start- & Scale-up-Veteranen

 - Zentrales Büro in München & legendäre Company Events
   




⭐ WARUM DIESE ROLLE BESONDERS IMPACTFUL IST




🚀 DU BAUST UNSERE GROWTH ENGINE

Du betreibst nicht einfach nur Outreach – du baust und skalierst unsere Outbound-Motion und erzeugst die Pipeline, die unser Enterprise-Wachstum antreibt.




💼 ENTERPRISE EXPOSURE AB TAG 1

Du sprichst direkt mit Werksleitern, Operations-Verantwortlichen und IT-Entscheidern in komplexen Produktionsumgebungen.




🧠 STRATEGISCHER, PROBLEMORIENTIERTER VERTRIEB

Du eröffnest Gespräche rund um Stillstandzeiten, OEE, Produktivität, Flexibilität und Operational Excellence – nicht über Feature-Listen.




⚙️ MODERNES, DATENGETRIEBENES SALES-SETUP

Du arbeitest mit HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, N8N, Clay sowie AI- & Automatisierungs-Tools, um Targeting, Messaging und Conversion systematisch zu optimieren.




🎯 HOHE EIGENVERANTWORTUNG & EXPERIMENTIERFREUDE

Du testest Hypothesen, iterierst Messaging, analysierst Conversion-Daten und entwickelst unseren GTM-Ansatz kontinuierlich weiter.






🪄 DEINE VERANTWORTLICHKEITEN

 - Identifikation und Recherche von High-Potential Enterprise Accounts

 - Analyse und Mapping von Buying Committees

 - Aufbau von Beziehungen zu relevanten Entscheidern

 - Konzeption und Durchführung hoch personalisierter Outbound-Kampagnen (Telefon, Social Selling, E-Mail)

 - Qualifizierung von Opportunities und strukturierte Übergabe an Account Executives

 - Aufbau einer konsistenten, planbaren Pipeline

 - Rückführung von Markt-Insights in Positionierung und Produktnarrativ

 - Kontinuierliche Optimierung von Outreach-Prozessen durch Experimente und Datenanalyse
   






🤝 WIR SUCHEN DICH, WENN…

 - Du 1–2 Jahre Erfahrung im B2B-Vertrieb, SaaS, Startup oder in einem dynamischen Tech-Umfeld mitbringst

 - Du strukturiert und analytisch denkst – in Conversion Rates, Experimenten und Optimierungsschleifen

 - Du Cold Outreach nicht scheust, sondern als strategische Disziplin verstehst

 - Du resilient bist und mit Ablehnung professionell umgehst – weil du weißt, dass sie Teil des Prozesses ist

 - Du erste Erfahrung mit CRM-Systemen (z. B. HubSpot) gesammelt hast

 - Du sicher und klar auf Deutsch und Englisch kommunizierst (C1/C2)

 - Du Ownership übernimmst und gerne in einem High-Performance-Team arbeitest

source_jobs.title: Quereinstieg Vertrieb (d/w/m)
source_jobs.description:
QUEREINSTIEG VERTRIEB (D/W/M)




WIR SIND WORKERBASE

Workerbase ist ein schnell wachsendes B2B-Softwareunternehmen, das Shopfloor-Operations transformiert.

Unsere Plattform stattet Frontline-Teams mit Echtzeitdaten, intelligenter Automatisierung und dynamischen Workflows aus – und ersetzt fragmentierte Legacy-Systeme sowie papierbasierte Prozesse durch skalierbare digitale Execution.

Vertrauen schenken uns Fortune-500-Unternehmen wie Porsche, Siemens, Bosch und BASF. Unterstützt von führenden Investoren starten wir in unsere nächste Phase des Enterprise-Wachstums.

Um diese Expansion weiter zu beschleunigen, suchen wir eine:n Business Development Representative (Quereinstieg), der/die strukturiert und datengetrieben eine hochwertige Pipeline aufbaut.




🎁 WAS WORKERBASE DIR BIETET

 - Die Möglichkeit, ein bewährtes Enterprise-Produkt mitzugestalten, das bereits von globalen Marktführern eingesetzt wird

 - Klarer Wachstumspfad in Richtung Account Executive oder andere GTM-Rollen

 - Starke Performance-Kultur mit Autonomie und Vertrauen

 - Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung mit leistungsbasierter Upside

 - Mitarbeiterbeteiligung (VSOP), um am Erfolg von Workerbase teilzuhaben

 - Flexible & hybride Arbeitsweise

 - Learning & Development Budget (1.500 EUR pro Jahr)

 - Sport- & Wellness-Zuschuss (Wellpass)

 - 28 Urlaubstage, mit einem zusätzlichen Tag pro Jahr (bis maximal 30 Tage)

 - Onboarding & Training durch erfahrene SaaS Sales Start- & Scale-up-Veteranen

 - Zentrales Büro in München & legendäre Company Events




🚀 DEINE MISSION

Du hast Spaß daran, den ersten Kontakt herzustellen, Potenziale zu erkennen und aus kaltem Outreach echte Geschäftsmöglichkeiten zu entwickeln? Dann bist du hier richtig.

Als Business Development Representative buchst du nicht nur Termine – du baust den oberen Teil unserer Revenue Engine auf. Du identifizierst Unternehmen mit Potenzial, schaffst Relevanz auf Entscheiderebene und legst die Basis für langfristige Enterprise-Kundenbeziehungen.






⭐ WAS DU VORANTREIBST




🎯 STRATEGISCHES HUNTING

Du identifizierst die richtigen Accounts und Ansprechpartner, verstehst Entscheidungsstrukturen und startest gezielte Outbound-Kampagnen über Telefon, LinkedIn und E-Mail.




📈 PIPELINE-AUFBAU

Du wartest nicht auf Inbound. Du generierst proaktiv qualifizierte Opportunities und sorgst für einen planbaren Dealflow.




🧠 PROBLEMORIENTIERTE GESPRÄCHE

Du pitchst keine Features. Du stellst die richtigen Fragen, erkennst Herausforderungen und positionierst Workerbase als Lösung für echte operative Probleme.




⚙️ MODERNES SALES-SETUP

Du arbeitest mit HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, N8N, Clay und KI-gestützten Tools, um Targeting, Messaging und Conversion kontinuierlich zu verbessern.




🔁 KONTINUIERLICHE OPTIMIERUNG

Du analysierst Response-Raten, testest Messaging-Ansätze und entwickelst unsere Outbound-Prozesse datengetrieben weiter.




🤝 TEAM-IMPACT

Du arbeitest eng mit Account Executives zusammen, um strukturierte Übergaben zu gewährleisten und Opportunities in echten Umsatz zu verwandeln.






🤝 WIR SUCHEN DICH, WENN:

Wir suchen keinen perfekten Lebenslauf – wir suchen Drive, Neugier und Resilienz.

Du passt gut zu uns, wenn:

 - Du in einem leistungsorientierten, kundenintensiven Umfeld gearbeitet hast (z. B. Gastronomie, Retail, Recruiting, Business Services) und jetzt in den Tech-Vertrieb wechseln willst

 - Du strukturiert und analytisch denkst – in Conversion-Raten, Experimenten und Optimierungsschleifen

 - Du Outreach als strategische Disziplin siehst

 - Du resilient bist und professionell mit Ablehnung umgehen kannst

 - Du ambitioniert bist und dich perspektivisch in Richtung Enterprise Sales entwickeln willst

 - Du sicher auf Deutsch und Englisch kommunizierst (C1/C2)




🚀 WARUM DAS DEIN KARRIERESPRUNG SEIN KANN

 - Du lernst Enterprise-Sales in einer der komplexesten Industrien

 - Du arbeitest direkt mit erfahrenen SaaS Sales Leadern

 - Du baust Skills auf, die dich Richtu

source_jobs.title: Product Marketer (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
We are Workerbase – building an AI platform that digitizes manual manufacturing processes for global brands like Porsche, Siemens, and Bosch. Demand is growing fast. We need a Product Marketing Manager who can translate what we build into messaging that moves markets – and who understands the world of industrial enterprise buyers.



If you know how to make complex technology feel obvious to a traditional enterprise audience – keep reading. 👇



⭐ WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE EXCITING



🏭 Real industry, real stakes. You're not marketing a SaaS tool to software teams. You're helping Bosch, Schaeffler, and Porsche rethink how work gets done on the shopfloor. Your messaging shapes how the world's largest manufacturers make buying decisions.

🧩 Positioning that actually matters. We're early in a category we're helping to define. You'll own how we show up to manufacturing and industrial enterprise buyers – a segment that demands credibility, precision, and proof.

🚀 Full-funnel ownership. From ICP definition and messaging to sales enablement, launch campaigns, and analyst relations – you set the strategy and execute it. No waiting for someone to hand you a brief.

🤖 AI as your operating system. You'll have full latitude to build AI-assisted workflows into how you research, create, and execute – not as an experiment, but as how we actually work. If you've been wanting to operate this way but your current setup won't let you, this is the role.

🏎️ Startup speed, enterprise context. No corporate layers. You'll work directly with founders, product, and sales to shape how Workerbase competes and wins.



🪄 WHAT YOU'LL DO



 - Own positioning and messaging for Workerbase – across industries, personas, and use cases – anchored in manufacturing and industrial enterprise.

 - Define and evolve our ICP. You know who we're targeting, why they buy, and what makes them hesitate.

 - Build and maintain the messaging architecture: value propositions, persona narratives, competitive differentiators.

 - Enable the sales team with battle cards, pitch decks, case study narratives, and objection-handling frameworks.

 - Plan and execute product launches – working closely with product to turn new features into market moments.

 - Drive content strategy for the enterprise buyer journey: thought leadership, customer stories, industry reports.

 - Develop analyst and influencer relationships in the manufacturing and industrial tech space.

 - Use AI tools to accelerate content creation, research, and campaign execution.



🤝 YOU'RE A FIT IF YOU



 - Have 5+ years of product marketing experience in B2B SaaS – ideally with exposure to manufacturing, industrial automation, ERP, MES, or other traditional enterprise verticals.

 - Know how to speak to enterprise buyers who are skeptical of hype and need to see ROI before they'll move.

 - Can take a technical platform and turn it into a crisp, compelling story – for a VP of Operations as easily as for a procurement lead.

 - Use AI tools daily to work faster and smarter – not as a novelty, but as part of how you actually get things done.

 - Are comfortable being hands-on: you write the copy, build the deck, run the launch – and you enjoy it.

 - Bonus: Speak German at C1 level or above.

 - Bonus: You've worked with or sold into manufacturing, logistics, or production environments.

 - Bonus: You've built a category narrative or repositioned a product in a crowded market.



🎁 WHAT YOU GET



 - Real ownership from day one – you shape the function, not just fill a role.

 - A seat at the table with founders, product, and sales leadership.

 - Flexible, hybrid work setup based in Munich.

 - Competitive salary and benefits.

 - Learning budget to keep growing.

 - Sports & wellness membership via Wellpass.

 - Stock options to share in our success.

 - A central Munich office and legendary company events.



🔎 ABOUT US



We exist because there's a smarter way to produce. With environmental and demographic challen

notes: Mostly sales and business development roles, with some marketing and product roles. No explicit tech roles.
